task_completion.description: Verify the 'Music & Effects' stem is imported and starts at 0.0s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the audio editor/DAW timeline, there should be a track for 'Music & Effects' with its audio waveform starting at the very beginning of the timeline (0.0 seconds).

task_completion.description: Verify the Spanish dialogue stem is imported and aligned to 4.0s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A track named 'dialogue_es' should be visible in the timeline, and the beginning of its audio clip/waveform must be aligned exactly with the 4.0-second mark on the time ruler.

task_completion.description: Verify the French dialogue stem is imported and aligned to 4.0s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A track named 'dialogue_fr' should be visible in the timeline, and the beginning of its audio clip/waveform must be aligned exactly with the 4.0-second mark on the time ruler.

task_completion.description: Verify the Spanish mix is exported to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the file being saved as 'cinematic_es.wav' in the '/home/ga/Audio/exports/' directory, or a file manager window showing this file successfully created in that folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the French mix is exported to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the file being saved as 'cinematic_fr.wav' in the '/home/ga/Audio/exports/' directory, or a file manager window showing this file successfully created in that folder.
The agent clicking 'File > Save', using a save shortcut, or the DAW window title showing 'MyProject' without an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a DAW interface (like Audacity, Ardour, or Reaper) being used to arrange the tracks, rather than the agent just typing ffmpeg commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the alignment was done by manipulating clips in the timeline.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen dragging or placing the audio clips on the timeline to the 4.0s mark using the mouse or clip properties dialogs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the DAW's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The DAW's native export audio dialog or progress bar should be visible, confirming the mixes were generated from the session.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected sync target for the dialogue stems is exactly 4.0 seconds on the timeline. The exported files must be saved to '/home/ga/Audio/exports/cinematic_es.wav' and '/home/ga/Audio/exports/cinematic_fr.wav'. The session name is 'MyProject'.
